data.body:
The problem isn’t AI. It’s what you’ve been told AI can do.
Chris Hood calls out the disconnect: companies can’t find ROI because they’re buying into capabilities that don’t actually exist. 
Hype is loud. Reality is quieter, and a lot more useful if you actually understand it.
